name: AGNC Investment Corp.
business: AGNC Investment Corp. invests primarily in Agency residential mortgage-backed securities (Agency RMBS) on a leveraged basis. It operates as a real estate investment trust (REIT) and provides private capital to the U.S. housing market. The company generates income from interest earned on investments net of borrowing and hedging costs.

exposures.sentence: We invest primarily in Agency residential mortgage-backed securities ("Agency RMBS") on a leveraged basis.

tamClaims.sentence: The $9 trillion Agency market plays a vital role in providing liquidity to homeowners and prospective homeowners to purchase or refinance homes.
